acceptance_targets: [chapter_14_prose_001] PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:51, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:104, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:126, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:146, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:264, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:332 no longer stack more than two interchangeable 'as if' constructions across the chapter, and each remaining comparison adds a distinct piece of perception rather than standing in for direct description. FAIL if three or more of these beats still use the same comparison template.

[chapter_14_prose_002] PASS if at least three of the cited beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:90, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:108, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:122, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:320, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:332 are rewritten to show concrete reactions from identified people or audible activity shifts, and the room itself is not used as the emotional proxy more than twice in the chapter. FAIL if the revised passage still relies on room-level abstraction or repeated 'No one...' beats for the same emotional function.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised passages at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:51, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:104, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:126, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:146, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:264, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:332 no longer stack more than two interchangeable 'as if' constructions across the chapter, and each remaining comparison adds a distinct piece of perception rather than standing in for direct description. FAIL if three or more of these beats still use the same comparison template.
findings.problem: The chapter leans on the same 'as if' comparison scaffold so often that the pattern becomes visible. Too many perceptions are routed through indirect analogy instead of direct sensory or causal statement, which softens the chapter's otherwise hard, bodily specificity.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise the comparison-heavy sentences at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:13, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:47, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:51, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:104, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:126, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:146, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:264, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:332. Keep only the comparisons that do uniquely necessary work; elsewhere convert the beat into direct perception, physical consequence, or a different sentence shape so the prose does not keep reaching for the same hinge.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if at least three of the cited beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:90, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:108, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:122, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:320, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:332 are rewritten to show concrete reactions from identified people or audible activity shifts, and the room itself is not used as the emotional proxy more than twice in the chapter. FAIL if the revised passage still relies on room-level abstraction or repeated 'No one...' beats for the same emotional function.
findings.problem: Collective reaction is repeatedly expressed through room-level proxy beats ('The room watched', 'The room took that in', 'The room did not feel the same') or group-negation beats ('No one...'). Reusing that abstraction at each emotional turn flattens the chamber's social texture and keeps the pressure one step less concrete than it could be.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rewrite the collective-response beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:57, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:90, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:108, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:122, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:320, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_14.md:332 so the reaction lands in named bodies, gestures, sounds, or changed work rhythms rather than in the room as a stand-in. Keep the communal pressure, but make it legible through specific people and physical movement.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
